audit_events_org_isolation_insert.name: audit_events_org_isolation_insert
audit_events_org_isolation_insert.withCheck: organization_id IS NULL OR organization_id = current_org_id()

retention_policies_org_isolation.name: retention_policies_org_isolation
retention_policies_org_isolation.using: organization_id IS NULL OR organization_id = current_org_id()

user_consents_org_isolation.name: user_consents_org_isolation
user_consents_org_isolation.using: organization_id IS NULL OR organization_id = current_org_id()

submission_files_org_isolation.name: submission_files_org_isolation
submission_files_org_isolation.using:
submission_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM submissions
        WHERE organization_id = current_org_id()
      )

submission_history_org_isolation.name: submission_history_org_isolation
submission_history_org_isolation.using:
submission_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM submissions
        WHERE organization_id = current_org_id()
      )
